info.title: GrowPanel API
info.description: GrowPanel REST API. SaaS analytics for subscription businesses — MRR, customers, cashflow, retention, forecasts. All endpoints require an API key passed as `Authorization: Bearer <key>`.

tags.name: Reports — MRR
tags.description: MRR over time, summary KPIs, daily growth, committed MRR.

tags.name: Reports — Leads & Trials
tags.description: Lead acquisition, trial starts, conversion funnel.

tags.name: Reports — Cashflow
tags.description: Cash received, failed payments, refunds, failure rate, outstanding AR.

tags.name: Reports — Retention & Cohorts
tags.description: NRR / GRR / customer retention and cohort tracking.

tags.name: Reports — Churn
tags.description: Scheduled future churn and AI-summarised cancellation reasons.

tags.name: Reports — Customers & Activity
tags.description: Per-country metrics, customer concentration, activity feed, custom-variable values.

tags.name: Plans
tags.description: List subscription plans configured in the billing source.

tags.name: Data — Plans
tags.description: Raw plan CRUD against a data source (separate from the analytics `Plans` view).

tags.name: Data — Plan Groups
tags.description: Bundle plans together so reports treat them as one product.

tags.name: Data — Segments
tags.description: Saved filter combinations applied via the `segment` param on report endpoints.

tags.name: Data — Data Sources
tags.description: List connected billing systems and monitor import progress.

tags.name: Data — Customers
tags.description: Raw customer rows for a data source (ingestion-level view, different from the analytics `Customers` endpoints).

tags.name: Data — Invoices
tags.description: Raw invoices imported from a data source.

tags.name: Profile
tags.description: The current user's profile (name, locale, timezone, accounts).

tags.name: Webhooks
tags.description: Subscribe HTTPS URLs to event notifications.

ApiKeyAuth.description: API key from /account/api-keys, passed as `Authorization: Bearer <key>`

get.description: Snapshot of headline metrics now plus 30/60/180/365-day-ago values and percentage changes. The single most common dashboard endpoint. Also accepts `custom_<key>` params for any account-defined custom variable; values are `~~`-separated for OR, prefix `~` to negate.

x-codeSamples.label: JavaScript
Python
x-codeSamples.source:
import os
from growpanel import GrowPanel

gp = GrowPanel(api_key=os.environ['GROWPANEL_API_KEY'])
result = gp.reports.get_summary(
    date="20260101-20260531"
)

x-codeSamples.source:
import (
    "context"
    "os"
    growpanel "github.com/growpanel/growpanel-sdk-go"
)

gp, _ := growpanel.New(os.Getenv("GROWPANEL_API_KEY"))
result, _ := gp.Reports.GetSummary(context.Background(), nil)

schema.description: Date range in `YYYYMMDD-YYYYMMDD` format. Defaults to the last 12 months when omitted.
Convert all amounts to this currency (ISO 4217, lowercase). Defaults to the account's base currency.
Currency filter. Space-separated for OR semantics. Example: `usd eur`.
Payment method filter (e.g. `visa`, `mastercard`, `ach`, `sepa`, `paypal`, `manual`). Space-separated.
Pricing model: `licensed` or `metered`. Space-separated.
Single customer ID to filter by.
Plan group ID. Use `GET /plans` to enumerate. Space-separated.
Customer-age bucket in months, `M-N` or `M-`. Space-separated. Example: `0-6 6-12`.
Billing frequency: `day`, `week`, `month`, `quarter`, `year`. Space-separated.

Country/region filter. ISO 3166 alpha-2 codes (`us de fr`) or named regions (`eu`, `apac`, `latam`, `north_america`, `nordics`, ...). Use `*` for "any value", `~` for "not set", prefix any value with `~` to negate.
US/CA state code (lowercase). Same special tokens as `region`.
Data source: `stripe`, `chargebee`, `recurly`, `google_sheets`. Space-separated. Prefix with `~` to exclude.
Customer or transaction status filter. Prefix value with `~` to negate (e.g. `~canceled`).
`true` (has any discount) or `false` (none).
Cancellation reason filter (`too_expensive`, `payment_failed`, `unused`, ...). Space-separated.
Saved segment ID (filter combination defined in the app). Expanded server-side.
Set `true` to use a fixed FX snapshot at period end instead of per-row historical rates.

get.description: One row per period (day/week/month/...) with the full set of MRR movements (new, expansion, contraction, churn, reactivation), totals (MRR, ARR, subscribers, ARPA, ASP, LTV), and retention metrics (NRR, GRR, churn rates). Also accepts `custom_<key>` params for any account-defined custom variable; values are `~~`-separated for OR, prefix `~` to negate.

end_date.description: Inclusive last date of the period.

new.description: MRR added by new customers in this period.

expansion.description: MRR added by expansions (upgrades, quantity increases).

contraction.description: MRR lost to contractions (downgrades, quantity decreases).

mrr_diff.description: Net MRR change in this period.

total_mrr.description: MRR at the end of this period.

total_arr.description: ARR at the end of this period (= MRR × 12).

arpa.description: Average revenue per account at period end.

asp.description: Average sale price (ARPA among paying customers).

quick_ratio.description: (new + expansion) / (churn + contraction). 4+ is healthy SaaS growth.

fx_adjustment.description: MRR change attributable to FX rate movement only (no real revenue change).

quantity.description: Total subscription quantity at period end.

breakdown.description: Set when a `breakdown` query param was used; identifies the grouping dimension.

get.description: Returns the running MRR delta within the current calendar month, day by day. Built for the dashboard "MRR growth" widget — the response is flat (one row per day) so the chart can render a current-month line plus an optional comparison overlay.

schema.description: Date range covering the month to chart plus the compare month. Defaults to current month + last month.
Convert all amounts to this currency (ISO 4217, lowercase). Defaults to the account's base currency.
Override the comparison month (YYYY-MM). Defaults to the month before the date range's end.
Comma-separated movement types to include. Subset of `new`, `expansion`, `contraction`, `churn`, `reactivation`. Default: all five.

date.description: Day of month, 0–31 (0 is a synthetic anchor at zero).

cumulative_mrr.description: Cumulative MRR delta from day 1 of the current month through this day.

cumulative_mrr_compare.description: Same metric for the compare month at the same day-of-month.

403.description: Account is blocked or trial expired

get.description: A merged feed of recent MRR movements, scheduled cancellations, and failed payments, sorted newest first. Used for activity widgets and change-detection polling.

schema.description: Maximum rows (1–100, default 30).
Lookback window in days (1–365, default 30).
`0` to omit failed payments. Default `1` (include).
`1` to include upcoming scheduled cancellations. Default `0` (exclude).
Convert all amounts to this currency (ISO 4217, lowercase). Defaults to the account's base currency.

effective_date.description: When the event takes effect (future for scheduled events).

overdue_date.description: When the payment first went past due (failed_payment only).

amount.description: Monetary amount in minor units (cents) of the base currency. May be negative for credits, refunds, contractions.
